narrativeBullets: Case AX-2 (AnXplore, MCA) -- aspect ratio 4.84, size ratio 2.87.
Steady 3-D Navier-Stokes (Taylor-Hood P2/P1) on the original AnXplore tetrahedral fluid domain.
Wall TAWSS 0.38 Pa, peak velocity 0.15 m/s, vorticity p90 360 1/s.
focusCase.uncertaintySummary: Split-conformal calibration at alpha=0.10: empirical coverage on the held-out cohort = 1.00, abstain rate = 0.00. Heatmap colour encodes mean wall risk; opacity encodes posterior standard deviation (epistemic uncertainty).
focusCase.modalityNote: Steady 3-D incompressible Navier-Stokes (Taylor-Hood P2/P1, Picard) on the real AnXplore tetrahedral fluid domain. Wall colored by computed WSS; streamlines seeded at the inlet plane. Demonstration only - not for clinical use.
